title: aster boergeri
intro: Aster boergeri, also known as Boerger's aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family and native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aster boergeri include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aster boergeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve coughs.
